title: Manufacturing Engineer - Astral Pipes - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Astral Pipes - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Astral Pipes has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Astral Pipes:
Astral Pipes is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Astral Pipes!
